Managed hosting for your buyers
When a buyer purchases your site, they can subscribe to our hosting plan at $49.99/month — giving them database, serverless functions, and an admin dashboard to run their new site. You close the deal, they grow.

Deal pipeline

From listing to payout

Five steps. Zero friction. Every deal tracked end-to-end on-platform.

Seller lists the site
Day 1
Set price, attach metrics, traffic data, and revenue proofs. Goes live to thousands of buyers instantly.
Buyer places offer
Day 1–3
Funds locked in secure escrow — neither side can access them until the deal confirms.
Transfer & verification
Day 3–7
Domain, codebase, and assets move to buyer. Both parties confirm delivery on-platform.
Payout hits your wallet
Day 7–14
Escrow releases to your Siterifty wallet instantly. Withdraw or reinvest in your next deal.
Buyer activates hosting
Optional
$49.99/mo managed hosting stack — database, serverless, admin panel. Zero DevOps required.
